category_sources: Official envmodules/modules README describes Environment Modules as a tool for modifying shell environments with modulefiles.
source_facts.description says modules dynamically modifies a user's environment via modulefiles.
display_name_sources: Official envmodules/modules repository and envmodules.io site identify the project as Environment Modules.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is also an official documentation surface.
Official envmodules/modules repository links to online documentation at modules.readthedocs.io.
repo_sources: Official envmodules/modules repository lists itself as the GitHub source repository for Environment Modules.
tags_sources: Official README notes shell support, modulefiles, and Tcl requirement.
source_facts.description mentions dynamic environment modification and modulefiles.
